label: Population
deltaNote: Annual growth rate declining; urbanization at 87%

label: GDP (Nominal)
source: Banco Central do Brasil / World Bank (2024)
deltaNote: Real GDP growth 2024 — strongest in Latin America

label: Gini Coefficient
contestNote: Improved from 53.4 (2021) but Brazil remains among world's most unequal large economies
deltaNote: Declining from Bolsonaro-era peak; Lula social policies credited

label: Unemployment Rate
deltaNote: Down from 6.9% in 2024; near historic low

label: Inflation (IPCA)
deltaNote: Above Banco Central 4.5% target ceiling; rate hikes ongoing

label: Amazon Deforestation (2024)
deltaNote: Lowest level in 9 years; Lula government credited with enforcement revival

label: Jan. 8 Rioters Convicted
contestNote: Bolsonaro allies claim sentences are excessive; human rights groups say process was fair
deltaNote: From 1,430+ arrested; average sentences of 15–17 years

label: Bolsa Família Beneficiaries
source: Ministério do Desenvolvimento e Assistência Social (2024)
contestNote: Critics say expanded program creates dependency; supporters cite poverty reduction evidence
deltaNote: Increased from 12.9M families (2022) after Lula expanded coverage
